home.introHeading: At Parinay Weddings, we specialise in thoughtfully planned, aesthetically refined weddings where every detail is handled with care.
home.introSubText: We don't believe in templates. Every wedding we plan is personal, intentional, and beautifully executed.
home.servicesHeading:
Anything & Everything Your Wedding Needs
Seamlessly Managed
home.servicesIntroText: We take complete ownership of your wedding planning journey, including:
home.service1Desc: Finding the perfect backdrop for your story
home.service2Desc: Crafting a visual experience that reflects you
home.service4Desc: Flawless management on your special day
home.servicesFooterText:
You enjoy the moments. 
We handle everything behind the scenes.
home.destinationBody1: Kerala offers some of the most stunning wedding destinations - beaches, backwaters, heritage venues, tea estates, and luxury resorts.
home.destinationBody2: Parinay Weddings specialises in managing destination weddings from start to finish - whether you're planning from within India or abroad.
home.destinationBody3: From intimate celebrations to large multi-day weddings, we ensure every element feels effortless and unforgettable
home.portfolioHeading: Each wedding we plan reflects the couple behind it - their love, their story, their style, their culture.

testimonials.text: Parinay Weddings turned our dream into reality. Every single detail was handled with such grace and precision — we didn't have to worry about a thing.
testimonials.author: Ananya & Rohit

testimonials.text: From the first consultation to the last dance, the team was exceptional. They understood our vision perfectly and delivered something beyond imagination.
testimonials.author: Priya & Siddharth

testimonials.text: The attention to detail and personal touch Parinay Weddings brought to our wedding was truly remarkable. Our guests are still talking about the beautiful decor!
testimonials.author: Rahul & Meera

testimonials.text: Choosing Parinay Weddings was the best decision we made. They managed everything so seamlessly, allowing us to fully enjoy every moment of our special day.
testimonials.author: Sneha & Arjun

testimonials.text: Professional, creative, and extremely reliable. Parinay Weddings exceeded all our expectations and made our destination wedding a truly unforgettable experience.
testimonials.author: Vikram & Ishani

home.transitionHeading: We manage complexity so your celebration feels effortless
home.youtubeHeading:
Every Love Story 
Deserves a Film
home.youtubeText1: Your wedding isn't just an event; it's a collection of fleeting, beautiful moments. Our films capture the laughter, the tears, and the quiet glances that make your day unique.
home.youtubeText2: We don't just document; we craft a narrative that feels like a movie starring you. From the grand entry to the intimate rituals, we preserve the emotion of your celebration forever.
home.formSubtext: Fill in your details below and our team will get in touch to schedule a personalised consultation within 24 hours.

about.differentiatorText:
At Parinay Weddings, we believe a wedding is more than an event - It is a deeply personal celebration of family, culture, and connection. For over 8 years. we have been planning and executing weddings across South India and beyond, working closely with couples and families to create celebrations that are meaningful with clarity and care.
Our approach is rooted in understanding - your vision, your priorities, your expectations - and translating them into a seamless wedding experience that feels authentic and beautifully organised.
about.heroQuote: Every couple has a story. Every wedding deserves its own identity.
about.teamSubtext: Behind every Parinay wedding is a dedicated team of planners, coordinators, and creative professionals who work seamlessly together.
about.philosophyQuote: We believe in the magic of beginnings and the beauty of forever. Your wedding is the first page of your greatest adventure.

services.service1Desc: For couples who desire a seamless, stress-free experience from conception to final execution. We handle the intricacies, curate the finest vendors, and oversee every logistical element of your multi-day celebration.
services.service1List:
Complete Venue Scouting & Management
Custom Design & Concept Creation
End-to-End Vendor Coordination & Contracting
Detailed Timeline & Budget Navigation
services.service2Desc: Ideal for couples who have started their planning journey or secured key vendors but need professional guidance to refine the aesthetic, synchronize logistics, and bring the vision across the finish line beautifully.
services.service2List:
Design Refinement & Integration
Vendor Sourcing for Remaining Categories
Logistical Fine-Tuning
Comprehensive Month-of Handover
services.service3Desc: For the meticulous couple who has planned every detail but understands the paramount importance of handing over the reins on the big day. We ensure your plans are executed flawlessly while you remain present and celebrate.
services.service3List:
Final Walkthrough & Rehearsal Management
Master Itinerary Creation
On-Site Day-Of Execution
Vendor Point of Contact
services.process1Desc: We begin by listening - understanding your priorities, preferences and expectations. Every detail matters in crafting your story.
services.process2Desc: We create timelines and custom designs aligned with your vision, ensuring a cohesive aesthetic and logistical precision.
services.process3Desc: Our team manages every detail on ground, ensuring the celebration flows smoothly and flawless execution.
services.process4Desc: You stay present with your loved ones while we handle everything behind the scenes, creating memories.
services.ctaDesc: If you're looking for a wedding planning partner who combines experience, creativity and reliability, we'd love to connect.

contact.heroSubtitle: Every extraordinary wedding begins with a single conversation. We look forward to hearing your story and vision.
contact.address:
Cochin, Kerala, India
By Appointment Only

storiesList.title: Backwater Bliss in Kumarakom
storiesList.desc: An elegant three-day celebration on the serene backwaters of Kerala, blending contemporary luxury with local charm.

storiesList.title: Clifftop Vows in Varkala
storiesList.desc: A breathtaking sunset ceremony on the red cliffs of Varkala, overlooking the endless expanse of the Arabian Sea.

storiesDestination.heroSubtitle: A curation of extraordinary celebrations, capturing the unique essence and emotion of every couple we serve.
storiesDestination.testimonialQuote: Parinay Weddings didn't just plan our event; they orchestrated a symphony of moments that we'll cherish forever.

storiesList.title: The Secret Garden Soirée
storiesList.desc: A whimsical floral-themed wedding that transformed a colonial estate into an ethereal garden oasis.

storiesThemed.heroSubtitle: Transforming spaces into immersive worlds that tell your unique love story through design.
storiesThemed.testimonialQuote: The attention to detail in our themed decor was absolutely breathtaking. It was like stepping into a dream.

storiesList.title: Heritage Grandeur at Mysore
storiesList.desc: A royal celebration at a heritage palace, honouring centuries-old traditions with opulent decor and meticulous planning.

storiesTraditional.heroSubtitle: Timeless traditions celebrated with contemporary elegance and profound respect for cultural roots.
storiesTraditional.testimonialQuote: They respected our traditions perfectly while bringing a fresh, premium feel to every ritual.

journalsList.title: Choosing the Perfect Backwater Venue in Kerala
journalsList.excerpt: Discover our curated list of the most stunning luxury resorts for your destination backwater wedding.

journalsList.title: Floral Trends for 2026: Sustainable Elegance
journalsList.excerpt: From locally sourced blooms to artisanal floral installations, explore the future of wedding decor.

journalsList.title: The Art of Managing a Luxury Wedding Budget
journalsList.excerpt: Expert advice on where to invest and how to prioritise for maximum visual impact and guest experience.

journals.guideDesc: Get access to our 'Kerala Destination Wedding Checklist' and venue comparison guide. A must-have for every couple planning from afar.

footer.tagline: Bespoke destination wedding planners based in Kerala, India. Planning meaningful celebrations for over 8 years.

storiesList.title: Tropical Paradise
storiesList.overview: A tropical paradise wedding in the heart of Kerala. We focused on the candid emotional exchanges that define the essence of a wedding.
storiesList.result: A flawlessly executed celebration that perfectly captured the couples vision.

storiesList.title: Backwater Magic
storiesList.overview: Magical backwater wedding in Kumarakom. This project was a meticulous exploration of heritage and modern luxury.
storiesList.result: The final outcome was a flawlessly executed celebration that perfectly captured the couples vision.

storiesList.title: Mist & Mountains
storiesList.overview: A wedding in the mist-filled hills of Munnar. Every element was planned with absolute directorial clarity.
storiesList.result: A timeless legacy preserved in every frame and every moment of the day.

storiesList.title: Timeless Romance
storiesList.overview: Timeless romance at the lakes of Udaipur. We sought to capture the soul of the union.
storiesList.result: A royal and romantic celebration that exceeded all expectations.

storiesList.title: Sunset Vows
storiesList.overview: Sunset vows on the shores of Goa. A dreamy beach-themed celebration with golden hues.
storiesList.result: A beautiful shoreline victory for the couple.

storiesList.title: Floral Elegance
storiesList.overview: Floral elegance in the Pink City. A whimsical garden oasis transformed into a royal celebration.
storiesList.result: The final outcome was a stunningly beautiful celebration of love and culture.
